text: What about IPv6? T * NAT isn't required for IPv6 ¢ All IPv6 addresses in AWS are publicly routable * The Internet Gateway works with ALL IPv6 IPs directly * NAT Gateways don’t work with IPv6 ¢ ::/0 Route + IGW for bi-directional connectivity ¢ ::/0 Route + Egress-Only Internet Gateway - Outbound Only
